name: Standard Interactive Component & Form System

userStory.iWant: a standardized way to build and compose interactive components (inputs, grids, trees)
userStory.soThat: I can easily nest complex stateful elements and manage form data using a unified TEA-native API.

acceptanceCriteria: A standard Component<Model, Msg> interface is established
TEA-native form fields (TextField, Checkbox, Slider) are implemented
Focus management (Tab/Shift+Tab) works globally across nested components
Real-time validation is supported per-field with error propagation to the UI
backwardCompatibility: Legacy 'Prompt-style' forms will be maintained for simple scripts, but the new system will be the recommended path for full TUI applications.

outScope: Third-party component library integrations (just providing the core system)

testPlan.goldenPath: Build a multi-field form with a TextField and a Checkbox. Press 'Tab' to move focus. Type into the field and assert that the parent model updates in real-time. Uncheck the checkbox and assert the model change.
edgeCases: Asynchronous validation (e.g. checking a username against an API)
Handling hundreds of fields in a single view
testPlan.fuzzStress: Randomly toggle 1000 form fields and verify that the model and UI remain in sync without memory leaks.
failureCases: Focus 'getting lost' in a deeply nested component

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(N) where N is number of fields
